issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing certificates or misconfigured labels.
The skill contains extensive explanatory text that may be considered verbose for a concise instruction set.

scenarios.name: Set up Traefik v3 fronting three Docker services with auto Let's Encrypt and HTTPS redirect
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used providers.docker with exposedByDefault=false, certificatesresolvers.letsencrypt.acme.tlschallenge=true, and the documented HTTP-to-HTTPS redirect entrypoint flags, plus per-service traefik.http.routers labels; baseline produced workable but generic Traefik labels and often picked the HTTP challenge or omitted exposedByDefault=false.

scenarios.name: Add rate limiting and IP allowlist middleware to an admin path on an existing Traefik setup
scenarios.rationale: Treatment chained traefik.http.middlewares.*.ratelimit.average/burst and ipallowlist.sourcerange labels on the router; baseline reached for nginx-style configuration or named the middlewares incorrectly (e.g. ipwhitelist instead of ipallowlist documented for v3).
